use_cases: Display interactive credit card preview in checkout and payment flows
Show virtual card details in digital banking applications
Provide 3D animated card reveal for secure payment forms
Serve as premium visual element in fintech dashboard interfaces
Enable click-to-reveal CVV security pattern in card components
ai_summary: A premium interactive credit card component featuring realistic 3D perspective tilt effects controlled by mouse movement using Framer Motion transforms. Offers three visual variants (gradient, dark, glass-morphism) and supports click-to-flip animation for CVV reveal with masked number display. Includes smooth entrance animations with staggered delays, making it ideal for payment interfaces, fintech dashboards, and e-commerce checkout experiences.
